message:
feat(protocol, server): enhanced schema generation and server improvements

Protocol Schema Enhancements (messages.rs, schema.rs):
- Extend JSON schema generation with improved type annotations
- Add support for optional field documentation in generated schemas
- Improve enum variant handling in schema output
- Add schema validation helpers for runtime checks

Server Improvements:
- cli/main.rs: Add CLI flag parsing improvements
- server/builder.rs: Enhance server builder configuration
- server/lib.rs: Improve module organization and exports
- server/proxy.rs: Add proxy configuration options
- server/router.rs: Extend routing capabilities
- server/tests.rs: Add comprehensive test coverage
- server/transform.rs: Add request/response transformers

Console & Examples:
- console/examples/tables.rs: Add table rendering examples
- core/lib.rs: Update core exports
- macros/lib.rs: Add macro helper

The schema generation improvements enable better documentation and
validation of MCP tool definitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
